Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.upgrade = 1 AND up.applicability = true 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') AND bs.bldg_id IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id 
HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/aaac87a7ecde75c38c2a436e579ab4552dffed2d5a0ff250c216ae5a1a68aa74/aa23f3db-4ee1-4857-8cbc-12937cb4049e/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
